title: Thumbsup 53cm Long Rectangular Plastic Trough Planter, Terracotta | 41L Large Raised Gardening Trough/Windowsill Herb Planter | Weather-Resistant, Outdoor Balcony Flower Pot | Plant Pot for Garden
features: SPACIOUS & VERSATILE PLANTER: This 53cm black rectangular trough is ideal for growing flowers, herbs, and vegetables and is suitable for gardens, balconies, and window sills.
STURDY RIPPLED DESIGN: This trough planter features durable rippled walls that enhance strength while adding a sleek, modern touch to outdoor and indoor spaces.
CUSTOMISABLE DRAINAGE: The trough planter is designed with a solid yet flexible base, allowing you to create drainage holes as needed for optimal plant health.
LIGHTWEIGHT & EASY TO MOVE: Weighing just 0.865kg, this planter is easy to reposition, making it simple to adjust your garden layout or bring plants indoors.
GENEROUS 41-LITRE CAPACITY: Provides ample space for deep root growth, while the slightly raised base supports better drainage to prevent waterlogging.
description: Thumbsup 53cm (41L) Long Rectangular Terracotta Trough Planter The Thumbsup 53cm Trough Planter is suitable for growing flowers, herbs, and vegetables, offering ample room for healthy root growth. With a generous 41-litre capacity, it provides optimal space for plants to flourish, making gardening easy and practical. Suitable for patios, balconies, gardens, and windowsills, its versatile rectangular design enhances any outdoor area. Constructed from lightweight yet durable weather-resistant plastic, this planter features rippled walls for additional strength and visual appeal. Its spacious design allows flexibility to plant various combinations of herbs, seasonal flowers, or vegetable crops, making it adaptable for gardeners of all levels. A convenient, functional solution for urban spaces, the planter's compact 53cm length fits effortlessly on balconies, patios, and even narrow window ledges, maximising limited space effectively. Key Features: 53cm Terracotta rectangular trough planter suitable for growing flowers, herbs, or vegetables Made from weather-resistant, lightweight plastic for long-lasting outdoor use Rippled wall texture adds structural strength and visual appeal The raised base design improves drainage and airflow, ensuring healthy plant roots 41-litre spacious capacity accommodates multiple plants comfortably Versatile for use on patios, balconies, windowsills, or in garden beds Specifications: Material: Durable plastic Colour: Terracotta Dimensions: H: 27cm/10.63", W: 30cm/11.81", L: 53cm/20.87" Capacity: 41 litres Weight: 0.865kg Includes: 1 x 53cm Terracotta Rectangular Trough Planter
